title: Individual
description: An individual registrant in OpenSPP (a single person / beneficiary). Backed by the Odoo model `res.partner` where `is_registrant=true` and `is_group=false`. Returned by `getIndividual` / `searchIndividual`.

spp_id.description: OpenSPP public identifier for the individual, prefixed with `IND_` (e.g. `IND_Q4VGGZPF`).

address.description: Postal address. Odoo returns `false` when unset.

phone.description: Phone number. Odoo returns `false` when unset.

gender.description: Gender of the individual. Configured via Odoo selection field on `res.partner`.

category_id.description: Many2many reference to partner categories / tags. Returned as an array of Odoo ids.
